+type MD5State = {a:Int, b:Int, c:Int, d:Int}

+fn left_rotate (value:Int, shift:Int)->Int
  +let masked:Int = value % 4294967296
  +let shifted:Int = (masked * pow(2, shift)) % 4294967296
  +let overflow:Int = floor(masked / pow(2, 32 - shift))
  +return (shifted + overflow) % 4294967296

+fn bitwise_and (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 AND y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_or (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 OR y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_xor (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit != y_bit
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int
  +return 4294967295 - (x % 4294967296)

+fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_and(x, y)
  +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)
  +return bitwise_or(xy, not_xz)

+fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)
  +return bitwise_or(xz, y_not_z)

+fn md5_h (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_xor(x, y)
  +return bitwise_xor(xy, z)

+fn md5_i (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let x_or_not_z:Int = bitwise_or(x, not_z)
  +return bitwise_xor(y, x_or_not_z)

+fn md5_round (state:MD5State, func:Int, k:Int, s:Int, t:Int)->MD5State
  +let temp:Int = 0
  +if func == 0
    +set temp = md5_f(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +elif func == 1
    +set temp = md5_g(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +elif func == 2
    +set temp = md5_h(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +else
    +set temp = md5_i(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +let sum:Int = (state.a + temp + k + t) % 4294967296
  +let rotated:Int = left_rotate(sum, s)
  +let new_a:Int = (state.b + rotated) % 4294967296
  +return {a: state.d, b: new_a, c: state.b, d: state.c}

+fn md5 (input:String)->String
  +let state:MD5State = {a: 1732584193, b: 4023233417, c: 2562383102, d: 271733878}
  +let len:Int = input.len
  +let bit_len:Int = len * 8
  +let padded:String = concat(input, "x")
  +let final_state:MD5State = md5_round(state, 0, 0, 7, 3614090360)
  +let hex:String = concat(to_string(final_state.a), to_string(final_state.b))
  +return hex

+type HttpRequest = {method:String, path:String, host:String, port:Int, body:String, content_type:String}

+type HttpResponse = {status_code:Int, body:String}

+fn build_http_post_request (req:HttpRequest)->String
  +let content_length:String = to_string(req.body.len)
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat(req.method, " "), req.path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", req.host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = concat(concat("Content-Type: ", req.content_type), "\r\n")
  +let line4:String = concat(concat("Content-Length: ", content_length), "\r\n")
  +let line5:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(concat(concat(line1, line2), line3), line4), line5)
  +let full_request:String = concat(concat(headers, "\r\n"), req.body)
  +return full_request

+fn send_http_request (req:HttpRequest)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(req.host, req.port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_post_request(req)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn parse_http_response (response:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [fail]
  +let header_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n\r\n")
  +check has_headers header_end >= 0 ~err_invalid_response
  +let body_start:Int = header_end + 4
  +let body:String = substring(response, body_start, response.len)
  +let first_line_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n")
  +let first_line:String = substring(response, 0, first_line_end)
  +let parts:List<String> = split(first_line, " ")
  +let status_str:String = get(parts, 1)
  +let status:Int = to_int(status_str)
  +return {status_code: status, body: body}

+fn hello ()->String
  +return "Hello, Forge!"

+module Crypto
  +type MD5State = {a:Int, b:Int, c:Int, d:Int}
  
  +fn bitwise_and (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
    +let x32:Int = u32_wrap(x)
    +let y32:Int = u32_wrap(y)
    +let result:Int = bit_and(x32, y32)
    +let wrapped:Int = u32_wrap(result)
    +return wrapped
  
  +fn bitwise_or (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
    +let x32:Int = u32_wrap(x)
    +let y32:Int = u32_wrap(y)
    +let result:Int = bit_or(x32, y32)
    +let wrapped:Int = u32_wrap(result)
    +return wrapped
  
  +fn bitwise_xor (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
    +let x32:Int = u32_wrap(x)
    +let y32:Int = u32_wrap(y)
    +let result:Int = bit_xor(x32, y32)
    +let wrapped:Int = u32_wrap(result)
    +return wrapped
  
  +fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int
    +return bit_not(x)
  
  +fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
    +let xy:Int = bitwise_and(x, y)
    +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
    +let not_x_z:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)
    +return bitwise_or(xy, not_x_z)
  
  +fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
    +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
    +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
    +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)
    +return bitwise_or(xz, y_not_z)
  
  +fn md5_h (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
    +let temp:Int = bitwise_xor(x, y)
    +return bitwise_xor(temp, z)
  
  +fn md5_i (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
    +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
    +let x_or_not_z:Int = bitwise_or(x, not_z)
    +return bitwise_xor(y, x_or_not_z)
  
  +fn md5_round (state:MD5State, func:Int, k:Int, s:Int, t:Int)->MD5State
    +let f_result:Int = func
    +let sum1:Int = state.a + f_result
    +let sum2:Int = sum1 + k
    +let sum3:Int = sum2 + t
    +let rotated:Int = left_rotate(sum3, s)
    +return {a: rotated, b: state.b, c: state.c, d: state.d}
  
  +fn md5 (input:String)->String
    +let a:Int = 1732584193
    +let b:Int = -271733879
    +let c:Int = -1732584194
    +let d:Int = 271733878
    +let hex_a:String = to_hex(a)
    +let hex_b:String = to_hex(b)
    +return concat(hex_a, hex_b)
  
  +fn to_hex_byte (n:Int)->String
    +let wrapped:Int = u32_wrap(n)
    +let masked:Int = bitwise_and(wrapped, 255)
    +let high:Int = shr(masked, 4)
    +let low:Int = bitwise_and(masked, 15)
    +let hex:String = to_hex(masked)
    +return substring(hex, 6, 8)
  
  +fn int_to_hex (n:Int)->String
    +let b0:String = to_hex_byte(n)
    +let b1:String = to_hex_byte(shr(n, 8))
    +let b2:String = to_hex_byte(shr(n, 16))
    +let b3:String = to_hex_byte(shr(n, 24))
    +let temp1:String = concat(b3, b2)
    +let temp2:String = concat(temp1, b1)
    +return concat(temp2, b0)
end

+module Http
  +type HttpRequest = {method:String, host:String, port:Int, path:String, body:String}
  +type HttpResponse = {status:Int, body:String}
  
  +fn build_http_post_request (req:HttpRequest)->String
    +let body_len:Int = req.body.len
    +let body_len_str:String = to_string(body_len)
    +let line1:String = concat("POST ", concat(req.path, " HTTP/1.1\r\n"))
    +let line2:String = concat("Host: ", concat(req.host, "\r\n"))
    +let line3:String = concat("Content-Length: ", concat(body_len_str, "\r\n"))
    +let line4:String = "Content-Type: application/json\r\n"
    +let headers:String = concat(concat(concat(line1, line2), line3), line4)
    +let with_end:String = concat(headers, "\r\n")
    +let final:String = concat(with_end, req.body)
    +return final
  
  +fn send_http_request (req:HttpRequest)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
    +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(req.host, req.port)
    +let request:String = build_http_post_request(req)
    +await write_result:String = tcp_write(conn, request)
    +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
    +await close_result:String = tcp_close(conn)
    +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
    +return parsed
  
  +fn parse_http_response (response:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [fail]
    +let first_space:Int = index_of(response, " ")
    +check has_space first_space>=0 ~err_invalid_response
    +let after_space:Int = first_space + 1
    +let status_start:Int = after_space
    +let status_end:Int = status_start + 3
    +let status_str:String = substring(response, status_start, status_end)
    +let status:Int = to_int(status_str)
    +let body_start:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n\r\n")
    +let body_offset:Int = body_start + 4
    +let body:String = substring(response, body_offset, response.len)
    +return {status: status, body: body}
  
  +fn build_http_get_request (host:String, path:String)->String
    +let line1:String = concat("GET ", concat(path, " HTTP/1.1\r\n"))
    +let line2:String = concat("Host: ", concat(host, "\r\n"))
    +let line3:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
    +let headers:String = concat(concat(line1, line2), line3)
    +let final:String = concat(headers, "\r\n")
    +return final
  
  +fn send_http_get (host:String, port:Int, path:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
    +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(host, port)
    +let request:String = build_http_get_request(host, path)
    +await write_result:String = tcp_write(conn, request)
    +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
    +await close_result:String = tcp_close(conn)
    +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
    +return parsed
  
  +fn fetch_google ()->Result<String> [io,async,fail]
    +call response:HttpResponse = send_http_get("google.com", 80, "/")
    +return response.body
end

+type Person = {name:String, age:Int, email:String}

+fn create_person (name:String, age:Int, email:String)->Result<Person> [fail]
  +check name_not_empty name.len>0 ~err_empty_name
  +check age_positive age>=0 ~err_negative_age
  +check age_reasonable age<=150 ~err_age_too_high
  +check email_not_empty email.len>0 ~err_empty_email
  +check email_has_at contains(email, "@") ~err_invalid_email
  +return {name: name, age: age, email: email}

!test create_person
  +with name="Alice" age=30 email="alice@example.com" -> expect Ok
  +with name="" age=30 email="alice@example.com" -> expect Err(err_empty_name)
  +with name="Bob" age=-5 email="bob@example.com" -> expect Err(err_negative_age)
  +with name="Charlie" age=200 email="charlie@example.com" -> expect Err(err_age_too_high)
  +with name="Dave" age=25 email="" -> expect Err(err_empty_email)
  +with name="Eve" age=25 email="notanemail" -> expect Err(err_invalid_email)

+fn hex_digit_to_int (ch:String)->Int
  +let code:Int = char_code(ch)
  +if code >= 48 AND code <= 57
    +return code - 48
  +elif code >= 97 AND code <= 102
    +return code - 97 + 10
  +elif code >= 65 AND code <= 70
    +return code - 65 + 10
  +else
    +return -1

+fn hex_pair_to_int (pair:String)->Int
  +let high:String = char_at(pair, 0)
  +let low:String = char_at(pair, 1)
  +let high_val:Int = hex_digit_to_int(high)
  +let low_val:Int = hex_digit_to_int(low)
  +return high_val * 16 + low_val

+fn hex_decode (hex:String)->String
  +let result:String = ""
  +let len:Int = len(hex)
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < len
    +let pair:String = substring(hex, i, i + 2)
    +let byte_val:Int = hex_pair_to_int(pair)
    +let ch:String = from_char_code(byte_val)
    +set result = concat(result, ch)
    +set i = i + 2
  +return result

+type MD5State = {a:Int, b:Int, c:Int, d:Int}

+fn left_rotate (value:Int, shift:Int)->Int
  +let masked:Int = value % 4294967296
  +let shifted:Int = (masked * pow(2, shift)) % 4294967296
  +let overflow:Int = floor(masked / pow(2, 32 - shift))
  +return (shifted + overflow) % 4294967296

+fn bitwise_and (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 AND y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_or (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit == 1 OR y_bit == 1
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_xor (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
  +let result:Int = 0
  +let bit:Int = 1
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < 32
    +let x_bit:Int = floor((x % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +let y_bit:Int = floor((y % pow(2, i + 1)) / pow(2, i))
    +if x_bit != y_bit
      +set result = result + bit
    +set bit = bit * 2
    +set i = i + 1
  +return result

+fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int
  +return 4294967295 - (x % 4294967296)

+fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_and(x, y)
  +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
  +let not_xz:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)
  +return bitwise_or(xy, not_xz)

+fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)
  +return bitwise_or(xz, y_not_z)

+fn md5_h (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let xy:Int = bitwise_xor(x, y)
  +return bitwise_xor(xy, z)

+fn md5_i (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
  +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
  +let x_or_not_z:Int = bitwise_or(x, not_z)
  +return bitwise_xor(y, x_or_not_z)

+fn md5_round (state:MD5State, func:Int, k:Int, s:Int, t:Int)->MD5State
  +let temp:Int = 0
  +if func == 0
    +set temp = md5_f(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +elif func == 1
    +set temp = md5_g(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +elif func == 2
    +set temp = md5_h(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +else
    +set temp = md5_i(state.b, state.c, state.d)
  +let sum:Int = (state.a + temp + k + t) % 4294967296
  +let rotated:Int = left_rotate(sum, s)
  +let new_a:Int = (state.b + rotated) % 4294967296
  +return {a: state.d, b: new_a, c: state.b, d: state.c}

+fn md5 (input:String)->String
  +let state:MD5State = {a: 1732584193, b: 4023233417, c: 2562383102, d: 271733878}
  +let len:Int = input.len
  +let bit_len:Int = len * 8
  +let padded:String = concat(input, "x")
  +let final_state:MD5State = md5_round(state, 0, 0, 7, 3614090360)
  +let hex:String = concat(to_string(final_state.a), to_string(final_state.b))
  +return hex

+fn to_hex_byte (n:Int)->String

  +let high:Int = floor(n / 16)

+fn int_to_hex (n:Int)->String
  +let b0:String = to_hex_byte((n % 256))

  +let b3:String = to_hex_byte(floor(n / 16777216))
  +let r1:String = concat(b0, b1)
  +let r2:String = concat(r1, b2)
  +return concat(r2, b3)

  +let dd:Int = d

  +return concat(r2, h4)

+type HttpRequest = {method:String, path:String, host:String, port:Int, body:String, content_type:String}

+type HttpResponse = {status_code:Int, body:String}

+fn build_http_post_request (req:HttpRequest)->String
  +let content_length:String = to_string(req.body.len)
  +let line1:String = concat(concat(concat(req.method, " "), req.path), " HTTP/1.1\r\n")
  +let line2:String = concat(concat("Host: ", req.host), "\r\n")
  +let line3:String = concat(concat("Content-Type: ", req.content_type), "\r\n")
  +let line4:String = concat(concat("Content-Length: ", content_length), "\r\n")
  +let line5:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
  +let headers:String = concat(concat(concat(concat(line1, line2), line3), line4), line5)
  +let full_request:String = concat(concat(headers, "\r\n"), req.body)
  +return full_request

+fn send_http_request (req:HttpRequest)->Result<HttpResponse> [io,async,fail]
  +await conn:Int = tcp_connect(req.host, req.port)
  +call request_str:String = build_http_post_request(req)
  +await _:String = tcp_write(conn, request_str)
  +await response:String = tcp_read(conn)
  +await _:String = tcp_close(conn)
  +call parsed:HttpResponse = parse_http_response(response)
  +return parsed

+fn parse_http_response (response:String)->Result<HttpResponse> [fail]
  +let header_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n\r\n")
  +check has_headers header_end >= 0 ~err_invalid_response
  +let body_start:Int = header_end + 4
  +let body:String = substring(response, body_start, response.len)
  +let first_line_end:Int = index_of(response, "\r\n")
  +let first_line:String = substring(response, 0, first_line_end)
  +let parts:List<String> = split(first_line, " ")
  +let status_str:String = get(parts, 1)
  +let status:Int = to_int(status_str)
  +return {status_code: status, body: body}

+module Crypto
  +type MD5State = {a:Int, b:Int, c:Int, d:Int}
  
  +fn bitwise_and (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
    +let x32:Int = u32_wrap(x)
    +let y32:Int = u32_wrap(y)
    +let result:Int = bit_and(x32, y32)
    +let wrapped:Int = u32_wrap(result)
    +return wrapped
  
  +fn bitwise_or (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
    +let x32:Int = u32_wrap(x)
    +let y32:Int = u32_wrap(y)
    +let result:Int = bit_or(x32, y32)
    +let wrapped:Int = u32_wrap(result)
    +return wrapped
  
  +fn bitwise_xor (x:Int, y:Int)->Int
    +let x32:Int = u32_wrap(x)
    +let y32:Int = u32_wrap(y)
    +let result:Int = bit_xor(x32, y32)
    +let wrapped:Int = u32_wrap(result)
    +return wrapped
  
  +fn bitwise_not (x:Int)->Int
    +return bit_not(x)
  
  +fn md5_f (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
    +let xy:Int = bitwise_and(x, y)
    +let not_x:Int = bitwise_not(x)
    +let not_x_z:Int = bitwise_and(not_x, z)
    +return bitwise_or(xy, not_x_z)
  
  +fn md5_g (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
    +let xz:Int = bitwise_and(x, z)
    +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
    +let y_not_z:Int = bitwise_and(y, not_z)
    +return bitwise_or(xz, y_not_z)
  
  +fn md5_h (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
    +let temp:Int = bitwise_xor(x, y)
    +return bitwise_xor(temp, z)
  
  +fn md5_i (x:Int, y:Int, z:Int)->Int
    +let not_z:Int = bitwise_not(z)
    +let x_or_not_z:Int = bitwise_or(x, not_z)
    +return bitwise_xor(y, x_or_not_z)
  
  +fn md5_round (state:MD5State, func:Int, k:Int, s:Int, t:Int)->MD5State
    +let f_result:Int = func
    +let sum1:Int = state.a + f_result
    +let sum2:Int = sum1 + k
    +let sum3:Int = sum2 + t
    +let rotated:Int = left_rotate(sum3, s)
    +return {a: rotated, b: state.b, c: state.c, d: state.d}
  
  +fn md5 (input:String)->String
    +let a:Int = 1732584193
    +let b:Int = -271733879
    +let c:Int = -1732584194
    +let d:Int = 271733878
    +let hex_a:String = to_hex(a)
    +let hex_b:String = to_hex(b)
    +return concat(hex_a, hex_b)
  
  +fn to_hex_byte (n:Int)->String
    +let wrapped:Int = u32_wrap(n)
    +let masked:Int = bitwise_and(wrapped, 255)
    +let high:Int = shr(masked, 4)
    +let low:Int = bitwise_and(masked, 15)
    +let hex:String = to_hex(masked)
    +return substring(hex, 6, 8)
  
  +fn int_to_hex (n:Int)->String
    +let b0:String = to_hex_byte(n)
    +let b1:String = to_hex_byte(shr(n, 8))
    +let b2:String = to_hex_byte(shr(n, 16))
    +let b3:String = to_hex_byte(shr(n, 24))
    +let temp1:String = concat(b3, b2)
    +let temp2:String = concat(temp1, b1)
    +return concat(temp2, b0)
end

    +let body_offset:Int = body_start + 4

    +return {status: status, body: body}

    +let line3:String = "Connection: close\r\n"
    +let headers:String = concat(concat(line1, line2), line3)
    +let final:String = concat(headers, "\r\n")
    +return final

+fn hex_digit_to_int (ch:String)->Int
  +let code:Int = char_code(ch)
  +if code >= 48 AND code <= 57
    +return code - 48
  +elif code >= 97 AND code <= 102
    +return code - 97 + 10
  +elif code >= 65 AND code <= 70
    +return code - 65 + 10
  +else
    +return -1

+fn hex_pair_to_int (pair:String)->Int
  +let high:String = char_at(pair, 0)
  +let low:String = char_at(pair, 1)
  +let high_val:Int = hex_digit_to_int(high)
  +let low_val:Int = hex_digit_to_int(low)
  +return high_val * 16 + low_val

+fn hex_decode (hex:String)->String
  +let result:String = ""
  +let len:Int = len(hex)
  +let i:Int = 0
  +while i < len
    +let pair:String = substring(hex, i, i + 2)
    +let byte_val:Int = hex_pair_to_int(pair)
    +let ch:String = from_char_code(byte_val)
    +set result = concat(result, ch)
    +set i = i + 2
  +return result
